name: @co0ontty/wand
description: A web console for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and other local CLI tools.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && node scripts/bundle-wterm.js && node scripts/bundle-qrcode.js && node scripts/bundle-browser.js && npm run generate:web-assets && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:copy-content && node scripts/stamp-build-info.js && node scripts/fix-dist-permissions.js
scripts.dev: node scripts/bundle-browser.js && npm run generate:web-assets && tsx src/cli.ts web
scripts.check: node scripts/bundle-browser.js && npm run generate:web-assets && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.browser.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: VER=${WAND_PUBLISH_VERSION:-$(git tag --sort=-v:refname --list 'v*' | head -1)} && VER=${VER#v} && npm version "$VER" --no-git-tag-version --allow-same-version && npm run build
